message: @trust_boundary(non_raising=True) also declares test_ref; a non-raising boundary returns a sentinel on malformed input and cannot have a raising test.
suggestion: @trust_boundary(non_raising=True) is mutually exclusive with test_ref: a non-raising boundary returns a sentinel on malformed input, so a raising test cannot exist. Drop test_ref/test_fingerprint, or drop non_raising=True and keep the raising test.
